negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg_file

1. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) => organic(X0)) [input(axiom)]

9. ~~(alkane(mixture) & contains_carbon(mixture)) [negated conjecture 8]
10. chemical(mixture) => single_element(mixture) [rectify 6]
12. alkane(mixture) & contains_carbon(mixture) [flattening 9]
14. alkane(mixture) [pure predicate removal 12]
15. ! [X0] : (organic(X0) | ~hydrocarbon(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
16. ! [X0] : (hydrocarbon(X0) | ~alkane(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
17. ! [X0] : (chemical(X0) | ~organic(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
18. ! [X0] : (~single_element(X0) | ~chemical(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
19. single_element(mixture) | ~chemical(mixture) [ennf transformation 10]
21. ~hydrocarbon(X0) | organic(X0) [cnf transformation 15]
22. ~alkane(X0) | hydrocarbon(X0) [cnf transformation 16]
23. ~organic(X0) | chemical(X0) [cnf transformation 17]
24. ~single_element(X0) | ~chemical(X0) [cnf transformation 18]
25. single_element(mixture) | ~chemical(mixture) [cnf transformation 19]
27. alkane(mixture) [cnf transformation 14]
29. 1 <=> single_element(mixture) [avatar definition]
30. single_element(mixture) <- (1) [avatar component clause 29]
33. 2 <=> chemical(mixture) [avatar definition]
34. ~chemical(mixture) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 33]
35. chemical(mixture) <- (2) [avatar component clause 33]
37. ~2 | 1 [avatar split clause 25,29,33]
38. hydrocarbon(mixture) [resolution 22,27]
39. organic(mixture) [resolution 38,21]
40. chemical(mixture) [resolution 39,23]
41. $false <- (~2) [forward subsumption resolution 40,34]
42. 2 [avatar contradiction clause 41]
43. ~chemical(mixture) <- (1) [resolution 30,24]
44. $false <- (1, 2) [forward subsumption resolution 43,35]
45. ~1 | ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 44]
s2. ~2 | 1 [sat_conversion 37]
s3. 2 [sat_conversion 42]
s4. ~2 | ~1 [sat_conversion 45]
s5. ~1 [rat s4,s3]
s6. # [rat s2,s5,s3]
46. $false [avatar sat refutation s6]
